ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state where the data was collected */,
  "state_desc" TEXT /* Description of the state where the data was collected */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city where the data was collected */,
  "geographic_level" TEXT /* Geographical level of the data (e.g., City, State) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data (e.g., Unhealthy Behaviors, Health Outcomes) */,
  "unique_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for the dataset */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "dataset_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  "dataset_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the dataset */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_city_name FOREIGN KEY ("city_name") REFERENCES cities ("city_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_state_abbr FOREIGN KEY ("state_abbr") REFERENCES states ("state_abbr"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_desc" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the state (e.g., FIPS code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_abbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state where the city is located */,
  "geographic_level" TEXT /* Geographical level of the city (e.g., City) */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_area" REAL /* Area of the city */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the city (e.g., FIPS code) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_name", "state_abbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Unhealthy Behaviors, Health Outcomes) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "category_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure (e.g., Binge Drinking, Mental Health) */,
  "data_value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data value (e.g., %) */,
  "data_value_type" TEXT /* Type of the data value (e.g., Age-adjusted prevalence) */,
  "data_value_type_id" TEXT /* ID of the data value type */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the measure */,
  "measure_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the measure belongs to */,
  "measure_source" TEXT /* Source of the measure */,
  "measure_unit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the unit used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_measure_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_values" (
  "data_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the data value belongs to */,
  "measure_id" TEXT /* ID of the measure the data value is for */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "low_confidence_limit" REAL /* Lower confidence limit of the data value */,
  "high_confidence_limit" REAL /* Upper confidence limit of the data value */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count associated with the data value */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographical location associated with the data value */,
  "data_value_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data value */,
  "data_value_source" TEXT /* Source of the data value */,
  "data_value_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the data value */,
  "data_value_version" TEXT /* Version of the data value */,
  "data_value_status" TEXT /* Status of the data value (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_values_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES measures ("measure_id")
)
